titleStmt.title: SII 26.25: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 25. (A.R. No. 25 of 1909.) KUṈṈAKKUḌI, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMANATHAPURAM DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the second pillar in the same cave.

This inscription records the gift of lands for food offerings to god Tirumalaiuḍaiya Tēnāṟṟu-Nāyakar at Tirukkuṉṟakkuḍi, one of the villages irrigated by (the river) Tēnāṟu, in Adaḷaiyūr-nāḍu in Kēraḷasiṅga-vaḷanāḍu, by Viraśēkharan Āḻuḍaiyān alias Adaiḷaiyūr-nāḍāḻvān. The gift lands, stated to be situated at Tirukkuṉṟakkuḍi comprised half the share of the donor the other half of it also being donated to the same deity in the place as per the record No. 26 below, by another donor who may have been closely related to the donor of the present record, perhaps a younger brother.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvaṉaccakkaravatti
kaḷ śrī vikkiramapāṇṭiyadevaṟku
yāṇṭu 6Āvatu keraḷaciṅka va
ḷanāṭṭu Ataḷaiyūrnāṭṭu tonāṟṟu
p pokku tirukkuṉṟakkuṭi tirumalai U
ṭaiya tenāṟṟu nāyakaṟku viracekara
n Āḻuṭaiyānāna Ataḷaiyūrnāṭā
ḻvānen Innāyanāṟku Amutupa
ṭikku tirukkunṟakkuṭi vayalil tevatā
nam kaliyāṉantuṭavai rūpāy � Ü m
kāñciran tuṭavai rūpāy mukkāl � m Ārā
mitulakan tuṭavai melatu rūpāy 2 1000m
kū kaimāntuṭavai nilam 2 1000 �m Aṭa
viaracukaṟai teṟku rūpāy �mmā
ṟa nāṭṭān tuṭavai vaṭakku rūpāy 2 1000 vi
ë m cuppiramaṇṇiya vayakkal rūpāy

latu rūpāy 2 1000m cūṟṟivayakkal rūpāy m 2 1000

yakkal rūpāy mukkāṇi kū ḵm nāvaṟ
ṟuṭavai taṭi § rūpāy tva 2 1000 �m kāṭu kā
ṇicey rūpāy 1kāṇi 2 1000 ¿ kū nna kaṇapati

kovai rūpāy (1/4) 100 çm kattū
ri cey rūpāy (1/4)m tiruvārūr vayakkal rūpāy

kal rūpāy tma 100m matacāḷai vallava
rūpāy 4 kū º Āṟukoḷ nīkki rūpāy 1kāṇi

kucakkuḻi rūpāy 2 1000 pim Āccan vaya
kkal rūpāy 1kāṇi � m vallampaṭaikkā
ṭeṟu rūpāy 2 1000 pim Āka nilam Eḻu
māviṉ kiḻkkāvil nammuṭaiya

raikkālāluḷḷa Iraiyum puḻu

yum maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭa Iṟai kuṭimai
kaḷum Ikkoyilil vaṭakkil nā
yanāṟku Amutupaṭikku nammuṭaiya dha
rmmamāka sandrādityavaṟ celvatāka
nirvārttu Iṟaiyili tevatāṉamā
y Ivvūr puravilum Iṟaṅkaṭṭu kalli
lum veṭṭi sandrādityavaṟ celvatāka
nirvārttuk kuṭutten viracekaranāna
Āḻuṭaiyānāna Ataḷaiyūr nāṭāḻvā
nen Innāyanāṟku Itu palmāheśva
ra rakṣai ...§
